title: acer mono subsp. savatieri
intro: Acer mono subsp. savatieri, also known as the Japanese maple, is a subspecies of the mono Japanese maple (Acer mono) that is native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acer mono subsp. savatieri include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
